summary: Tamper-Proof Verification Page E2E testing completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional - status banners (AUTHENTIC/WARNING/NOT VERIFIED), document hash display, file upload validation section all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting (30/minute) properly implemented on GET /api/verify/stamp/{id} endpoint
Document hash validation via POST /api/verify/stamp/{id}/validate-document returns hash_match boolean
SHA-256 document fingerprint correctly displayed in frontend
Status banners correctly display based on stamp status: green=active, amber=revoked/expired, red=not found
seed_data_creation: None - used existing stamps from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verification page at /verify fully implemented. APIs: GET /api/verify/stamp/{id} (returns stamp info with document_hash), POST /api/verify/stamp/{id}/validate-document (validates uploaded file against stored hash). Test stamps: TLS-20260225-0DEF71F8 (active), TLS-20260225-0DF3062C (revoked). Frontend shows three tabs (Stamp ID, Scan QR, Upload), trust indicators (Tamper-proof, Instant results, SHA-256 secured), and proper status banners.
